findings.description: debate candidate score uses plain confidence average, not Stage4 weighted score with fix_code penalty, so borderline classification can drift from final verdict threshold.
findings.fix_code: Use the same scoring function as weighted_vote.py (agent weight + fix_code penalty) to compute borderline/dispute score.

findings.description: Stage3 debate selection is based on unweighted confidence mean, which is inconsistent with consensus score used by acceptance gate and may surface non-borderline buckets as disputed.
findings.fix_code: Import a shared score helper and evaluate debate interval against the same score scale used for acceptance decisions.

findings.description: accepted findings sorting misses evidence_count tie-breaker required by report spec, causing nondeterministic order for equal severity and score.
findings.fix_code: Extend sorting key with -int(item.get('evidence_count', 0)) after severity and score.

findings.description: report ordering does not apply the documented third key evidence_count when severity and score tie.
